data.narrative: Charles is a 30-year-old male working as a machine operator or assembler. They have no diploma level education and poor health. They live as: living with another family member. They rely on public transport or walking.

encounters.contact_narrative: Chloé is a 23-year-old female working as a professional. They have vocational or technical level education and good health. They live as: couple with children. They rely on public transport or walking.
